description: Project-level MCP registry for the Peak Post autonomous-business stack. Reference env vars from C:\Users\colet\.env — never inline secrets. Last updated 2026-05-15.

browser-fork._note: Already working; authenticated to Google + CWS + Gumroad via Edge profile.

stripe._install_when: After user pastes STRIPE_SECRET_KEY into .env. Walkthrough step 1.

resend._install_when: After user verifies sending domain. Walkthrough step 4.

vercel._install_when: After user pastes VERCEL keys. First call opens OAuth flow.
vercel._note: Hosted MCP — no local process. Auth via OAuth on first use.

sentry._install_when: After Sentry signup + first project. Walkthrough step 11.
sentry._note: Hosted MCP — auth via OAuth on first call.

posthog._note: Hosted MCP — auth via OAuth on first call.

github._install_when: After user generates fine-grained PAT. Walkthrough step 7.

_install_command: From this project root: claude mcp add --json (browser-fork already installed)

decisions: RapidAPI MCP excluded — marketplace decaying post-Nokia acquisition
Apify MCP not yet listed — use Apify CLI from Bash for now; revisit when official MCP ships
Polar.sh MCP not yet listed — use REST API from agent code
Beehiiv MCP not yet listed — use REST API from apis/beehiiv-poster/
Telegram MCP not yet listed — use Bot API directly
CrewAI / n8n explicitly NOT added — superseded by Anthropic Agent SDK
